description: Open Service Broker API is an open specification for how platforms interact with service brokers to provision and manage backing services. The openservicebrokerapi.org site is an informational project homepage that links to the specification and community resources.
summary: openservicebrokerapi.org is a project website for the Open Service Broker API specification and does not expose a developer-callable API, GraphQL endpoint, MCP server, or CLI on the openservicebrokerapi.org domain.
